arts.ttl: Pulisic slams rumors of rift with Milan coach as “unacceptable lies”
arts.sum: However, this Thursday, Milan’s official social media channels shared statements from Pulisic, denying these reports and affirming that there are no issues with Conceição and that he is very happy at Milan . Following rumors of a rift after Milan’s Champions League exit to Feyenoord this week, Pulisic clarified that he is happy at the club and committed to staying.
